news.title:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.
news.summary:
Several major stocks, including Kotak Bank, HUL, and Varun Beverages, hit 52-week lows amid extended losing streaks.
Notable corrections include Five Star Finance (-57%), Tata Motors PV (-55%), and Trent (-43%) from their respective 52-week highs.

news.title:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.
news.summary:
Tata Group Q3 FY26 results show diverse performance; Titan saw 36% QoQ revenue growth, TCS revenue rose 2%, but profit declined 12%.
Tata Steel revenue fell 3% QoQ but surged 6% YoY; Trent and Oriental Hotels showed strong profitability, while Tata Investment profits dropped QoQ.

news.title:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.
news.summary:
Sensex dropped 1,236 pts to 82,498; Nifty fell 365 pts below 25,500, erasing ₹7L cr in market cap.
InterGlobe, Trent, UltraTech fell; ONGC, Oil India gained as Brent crude crossed $71/barrel.

news.title:
Trent may miss Q4 FY26 guidance, adding only 9 Zudio stores in 45 days.
To meet its FY26 target, Trent needs 90–110 new stores in Q4, challenging at current pace.
news.summary:
Trent may miss Q4 FY26 guidance, adding only 9 Zudio stores in 45 days.
To meet its FY26 target, Trent needs 90–110 new stores in Q4, challenging at current pace.

news.title:
Trent's Co-CEO reveals focus on growth in Tier 3 and Tier 4 towns.
Despite lower revenue and spending, smaller towns are the new target areas.
news.summary:

news.title:
Trent Ltd's CEO highlights a shift towards smaller towns for growth.
This strategy aligns with recovery in discretionary demand post GST changes.

news.title:
Trent's 25% growth target remains intact, says P. Venkatesalu.
This statement was made during the Retail Leadership Summit.

news.title:

IT stocks like Mphasis, Infosys, and Coforge fall over 1%.

news.title:
Kotak Securities cuts Trent's target price to Rs 3850, reducing FY26-28 revenue projections by 1-8%.
FY2028 EPS projections for Trent are also reduced by 6% by Kotak Securities.
news.summary:
Kotak Securities cuts Trent's target price to Rs 3850, reducing FY26-28 revenue projections by 1-8%.
FY2028 EPS projections for Trent are also reduced by 6% by Kotak Securities.

news.title: Citi retains 'Sell' rating on Trent with a target price of Rs 4,350.
news.summary: Citi retains 'Sell' rating on Trent with a target price of Rs 4,350.

news.title:
Nifty stocks Trent, Bharti Airtel, and Max Healthcare are in focus for Q3 results.
Earnings updates include Tata Motors, LIC, Nykaa, Suzlon, Hero MotoCorp, and others.

news.title:
Nifty's movement hinges on IT stocks, index heavyweights Reliance, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and expiry volatility.
Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.
news.summary:

Key levels for Nifty are 25,800 resistance and 25,500 support; earnings updates include Trent, NHPC, Tata Power, LIC, and Bharti Airtel.

news.title:
Trent reported Q3 EBITDA of 10.8B INR, up from 8.43B INR YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 20.2% from 18.1% YoY, reflecting strong performance.
news.summary:
Trent reported Q3 EBITDA of 10.8B INR, up from 8.43B INR YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 20.2% from 18.1% YoY, reflecting strong performance.

news.title:
Trent Ltd's Q3FY26 revenue grew 16%, with EBITDA up 23% and PAT rising 41%.
The company expanded with 17 Westside, 48 Zudio stores, reaching 274 cities.
news.summary:
Trent Ltd's Q3FY26 revenue grew 16%, with EBITDA up 23% and PAT rising 41%.
The company expanded with 17 Westside, 48 Zudio stores, reaching 274 cities.

news.title:
Trent Q3 results expected tomorrow; EBITDA projected to rise 19% YoY.
Focus on demand trends and revenue commentary as key updates.
news.summary:
Trent Q3 results expected tomorrow; EBITDA projected to rise 19% YoY.
Focus on demand trends and revenue commentary as key updates.

news.title:
Trent shares rose 1.55% to Rs 3,882 ahead of Q3 results, with expected 22% YoY profit growth and 15%+ sales rise.
Brokerages estimate Q3 profit at Rs 539.9-571.1 crore, driven by store additions; margins may dip due to Zudio revenue mix.
news.summary:
Trent shares rose 1.55% to Rs 3,882 ahead of Q3 results, with expected 22% YoY profit growth and 15%+ sales rise.
Brokerages estimate Q3 profit at Rs 539.9-571.1 crore, driven by store additions; margins may dip due to Zudio revenue mix.

news.title:
Trent Limited announced the amalgamation of its step-down subsidiary THPL Support Services Ltd with Booker India Ltd, effective 1st February 2026.
The merger aims to streamline group structure for operational and financial efficiency; no change in Trent's shareholding pattern.
news.summary:
Trent Limited announced the amalgamation of its step-down subsidiary THPL Support Services Ltd with Booker India Ltd, effective 1st February 2026.
The merger aims to streamline group structure for operational and financial efficiency; no change in Trent's shareholding pattern.

news.title:
Markets ended lower; Sensex fell 271 pts to 81,910, Nifty slipped 75 pts to 25,158. India VIX surged 8%, reflecting sharp volatility.
Midcap index dropped 662 pts; biggest losers included ICICI Bank, Trent, Bharat Electronics, while CreditAccess Grameen rose 10%.
news.summary:
Markets ended lower; Sensex fell 271 pts to 81,910, Nifty slipped 75 pts to 25,158. India VIX surged 8%, reflecting sharp volatility.
Midcap index dropped 662 pts; biggest losers included ICICI Bank, Trent, Bharat Electronics, while CreditAccess Grameen rose 10%.
